summary: Iteration 52: Client Messaging Bug Fixes - All tests passed. Both bugs fixed: (1) Client can now send messages without 'Failed to send message' error, (2) Chat history visible after sending for both CM and Client. Two-way sync verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 tested client messaging bug fixes. All working: (1) Client MessageCenter.jsx now uses /api/cm-tools/client-messages/send endpoint correctly, (2) Both CM and Client share same cm_client_messages collection, (3) GET /api/cm-tools/communications/{case_id} allows client access to their own cases. Test messages exist in LEAMSS-2024-0001 case.

bug_fix_1_client_send_message.details: Client can send messages via POST /api/cm-tools/client-messages/send. No 'Failed to send message' error. Message appears in chat immediately.

bug_fix_2_chat_history_visible.details: Chat history visible after sending for both CM and Client. Messages persist in cm_client_messages collection.

cm_communication_hub.details: CM can select case, view chat history, send messages. Quick templates available. Message type selector works.

two_way_sync.details: CM sends message → Client sees it. Client sends message → CM sees it. Both use same cm_client_messages collection.

client_access_to_communications.details: GET /api/cm-tools/communications/{case_id} now allows client access to their own cases (not just CM/Admin).

frontend_tests_summary.client_messages_tab: PASS - Messages tab visible in sidebar under COMMUNICATION section
frontend_tests_summary.client_conversation_list: PASS - Shows LEAMSS-2024-0001 with last message preview
frontend_tests_summary.client_send_message: PASS - No 'Failed to send' error, message appears in chat
frontend_tests_summary.client_chat_history: PASS - Shows both client (green) and CM (gray) messages
frontend_tests_summary.cm_client_messages_tab: PASS - Client Messages visible in sidebar
frontend_tests_summary.cm_communication_hub: PASS - Case selector, chat history, quick templates all working
frontend_tests_summary.cm_send_message: PASS - Message sent successfully, appears in chat
frontend_tests_summary.two_way_sync: PASS - CM messages visible to client, client messages visible to CM

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
